eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:32 AM on MAY 28, 2026 Effective until 7:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Paul William Bellevoine,  last seen on foot wearing light blue scrub shirt and blue pants. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
